---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To reproduce**
Steps and minimal input to trigger the behavior.

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen instead.

**Environment (please complete):**
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Node version: [e.g. 18, 20, 22]
- CLI flags used: [e.g. `--scan`, `--validate`, `--semantic`]

**Additional context**
Any relevant skill definitions, task descriptions, or log output.
